title: HSBC ‘reviewing’ private school perk for bankers in Hong Kong
summary_full: Hundreds of senior staff in territory benefit from nearly £30,000-a-year grant per child not available to staff in group’s other hubsBusiness live – latest updatesHSBC is reportedly reviewing a perk that covers school fees for bankers in Hong Kong as part of a big overhaul of the bank under chief executive Georges Elhedery.Europe’s largest bank is considering whether to scrap the perk for new employees or make changes to total compensation, Bloomberg News reported. No decisions have been made yet. Continue reading...
